## What changed

Describe the user outcome and the implementation boundary.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check:all`
- [ ] `npm run check:browser` for capture, overlay, or performance changes
- [ ] Standard build does not request `debugger`
- [ ] Collector-only behavior remains explicitly authorized
- [ ] UI changes were checked in a real browser at narrow and wide widths
- [ ] Documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated when behavior changes

## Evidence

Include relevant screenshots, benchmark output, or failure/recovery cases. Do not include captured private page content, API keys, or credentials.
